title: CBJ Regular Municipal Election October 4, 2022 Candidate Filing Period Closed 7/25/2022
summary: The filing period for the City and Borough of Juneau Assembly and Board of Education (School Board) opened Friday, July 15, 2022 at 8:00 a.m. and closed on Monday, July 25, 2022 at 4:30 p.m. A complete list of the certified candidates can be accessed on our website at https://juneau.org/clerk/clerk-...

title: Scientists to set sail in search of Bering Sea’s stormy past
summary: A team of scientists will soon head to the Aleutian Islands aboard the research vessel Sikuliaq on a voyage to reconstruct the region’s ancient history of powerful storms. Little is known about the Bering Sea’s long-ago record of extreme weather and the factors that drove it. “Learning about the past is the only way to confront the future effectively,” said associate professor Chris Maio of the UAF Geophysical Institute...
